temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) In a kitchen, Ross stands with his back to the camera, gesturing with his right hand towards Joey, who is off-screen. Joey, wearing a grey sweater, stands with his hands on his hips, looking at Ross with a slightly exasperated expression. (Storyline: The scene opens on a conversation between Ross and Joey, establishing a disagreement or argument about a woman named Mary Angela.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Exasperated, slightly pleading. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:02-00:05) The camera cuts to a close-up of Ross, who is now facing Joey. He gestures with his right hand as he explains his point, his expression earnest and slightly frustrated. Joey's back is to the camera, showing his reaction. (Storyline: Ross continues to argue his point, suggesting a simple plan to find Mary Angela, which seems to be the source of the conflict.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Pleading, logical. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
